Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for the SF Public Administrator, Petitioner.

The court begins by acknowledging the filing of the declaration regarding due diligence and advises Ms. Mannion that it is has been determined to be sufficient. The court then queries Ms. Mannion regarding whether a petition to determine heirship might be filed. Ms. Mannion reports that after paying creditors, there may not be much left of the estate, but regardless the Public Administrator plans to follow-up with the Japanese Consulate to continue the search for heirs.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
